title: Luffy Enters Queen’s Deadly Prison Game
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Big Mom, Unknown person #2, Luffy, Unknown person #3, Momonosuke as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Queen turns Udon into a spectacle while Luffy and Hyogoro are forced to survive a deadly punishment game.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The seas near Wano

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're in a pretty pickle. Peroin!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The big mom pirates were pushed off the water- fall!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: of all places...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama fell off the ship at the top of the waterfall!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as King's protecting the skies, we won't be able to get any closer.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a miracle that this ship didn't capsize.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So we have no choice but to wait?

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Mama's Vivre card is still intact.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So she's still alive!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that, too, is a miracle, to be quite honest.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Some of the devil fruit users drowned...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: IYOO! PON! �

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Isn't it more likely that she was picked up by an enemy?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Huh?! by Kaido?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if she did somehow manage to get blasted onto land, we're in enemy territory! She'd eventually get captured.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They may have been allies once in the past, but... now they're both yonkou. enemies!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: He'll probably kill her.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And then the big mom pirates will be renamed... the Peropero Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oi, Pero! The next captain is obviously going to be dogtooth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: succession is determined by birth order. ♙

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No way, idiot! It's obviously skill!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Quit killing off Mama! \\

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: She'll definitely come back!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit trying to apply normal logic to her!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Kuri braided hat village

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: "Big Mom"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes! She's a veeeery strong outsider!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait just a minute! How in the world did a little walk to the beach

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Turn into a voyage to the perilous Udon?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get back here at once, Tama! I'll listen to your explanations later!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Lord MOMONOSUKE, are you there?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kinemon very specifically entrusted me with keeping you safe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Master! It's okay!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'll protect momo! As a Kanoichi!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: A kunoichi?! you're barely half a kunoich!!

dialogue.speaker: Tama
dialogue.text: Get back here, O-TAMA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Hitetsu! I'm with them as well,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we've already departed, so... Please let everyone else know what's happened!

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: this won't do, kiku! return at-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kuri Waste- Lands

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You just said the words "Big Mom"... I feel like I've heard them somewhere...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WAAAAGH! Don't worry! It's nothing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmm... this little crocoturtle

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: is a good boy. How tame.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: She tamed him with just two punches!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were all really poor and couldn't even give us any food for the road, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The people of leftover town are all so nice!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yaaah! Daah!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Especially to me! I don't even know who I am!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That talking hat's been silent this whole time...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Did it lose its memories too?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope we get to upon soon. I'm so hungry...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Quit looking at me while drooling!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 54 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
